sourceWarning: Afghan Bistro publishes current names, descriptions, meal-period sections, modifier choices, and item-specific gluten-free labels, but no complete allergen matrix, complete recipes, or kitchen cross-contact policy. Positive signals are limited to fixed published ingredient terms and mandatory named formats; optional salad proteins and vegan substitutions are excluded. An item-specific gluten-free label prevents a conflicting wheat/gluten signal. The home-page statement that almost everything is gluten free is not converted into item-level negative allergen claims.

items.name: Mango Chutney [16oz]
items.description: Sweet and Spicy. Pairs well with your Spicy Risotto and Qabuli combination platter but, of course, you may add to any dish you choose or enjoy as a dipping sauce.
items.ingredientsText: Sweet and Spicy. Pairs well with your Spicy Risotto and Qabuli combination platter but, of course, you may add to any dish you choose or enjoy as a dipping sauce.

items.name: Fresh Herb Chutney [16oz]
items.description: Vinegar, herbs, garlic, and chillis combine to make this a mouthwatering, spicy, and tangy, chutney. Your Kabobs and grilled meat will be enhanced by the Fresh Herb Chutney but, of course, you may add to any dish you choose or enjoy as a dipping sauce.
items.ingredientsText: Vinegar, herbs, garlic, and chillis combine to make this a mouthwatering, spicy, and tangy, chutney. Your Kabobs and grilled meat will be enhanced by the Fresh Herb Chutney but, of course, you may add to any dish you choose or enjoy as a dipping sauce.

items.name: Red Chili Chutney [16oz]
items.description: This is the spiciest of our four chutneys but still mild enough not to require a warning label. The Red Chili Chutney will enhance your kabobs, your potatoes, and any other dish you want to spice up or you may enjoy as a dipping sauce.
items.ingredientsText: This is the spiciest of our four chutneys but still mild enough not to require a warning label. The Red Chili Chutney will enhance your kabobs, your potatoes, and any other dish you want to spice up or you may enjoy as a dipping sauce.

items.name: Avocado, Cilantro, and Yogurt Chutney [16oz]
items.description: Our mildest of the four chutneys. The avocado chutney is a delightful addition to your delicious Turnovers and most vegetarian dishes but, of course, you may add to any dish you choose or enjoy as a dipping sauce.
items.ingredientsText: Our mildest of the four chutneys. The avocado chutney is a delightful addition to your delicious Turnovers and most vegetarian dishes but, of course, you may add to any dish you choose or enjoy as a dipping sauce.
